<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/companies/{company_id}/contractor_payments/{contractor_payment_id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns a single contractor payment.

scope: `payrolls:read`
